global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with engaging text and icons promoting the app.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to install the app with a promotional offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: StormByte logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized text logo that reads 'StormByte' in a prominent position at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Unlock rare gear text
elements.description: A clear, inviting text that states 'Unlock rare gear' in a friendly font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: No ads in first week
elements.description: A supportive text below the main message that reads 'No ads in first week', emphasizing a promotional offer.

elements.label: Background pattern
elements.description: A subtle geometric pattern in the background that adds visual interest without distracting from the text.

elements.label: Gear icon
elements.description: A simple, stylized gear icon that represents the concept of unlocking gear, placed at the top left.

elements.label: Arrow icon
elements.description: A right-pointing arrow icon that suggests action or progression, located at the top right.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Install now', designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element that adds visual flair, positioned near the top.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Another small decorative element that complements the overall design, located in the center.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element that enhances the visual appeal, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element that adds to the design, located in the center.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline text 'StormByte' is bold and prominent, capturing attention at the top.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: A clear and engaging message that highlights the offer, centered in the ad.
elements.text_content: Unlock rare gear No ads in first week

elements.label: Install now call to action
elements.description: A prominent call-to-action button at the bottom with a clear directive to install the app.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and playful, StormByte logo, install now button
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: StormByte, Unlock rare gear, No ads in first week, Install now
